expected_question: Where can a beginner find a 101-level online rope-bondage learning resource?
reason: The same canonical Rope365 homepage is used by held-out evaluation and heldout_docs, so this directory training row is excluded while the owner-supplied URL remains preserved in sources/rope_resources_v1.json.

expected_answer: Rope 365 (101-level rope-bondage learning): https://rope365.com/; The Duchy (mixed-access intermediate floor-based rope tutorials): https://www.theduchy.com/; Crash Restraint (introductory suspension learning): https://crash-restraint.com/; Shibari Study (a membership-based intermediate suspension course catalog): https://shibaristudy.com/
